title: Simple Bag of Holding
description: A small mod that just adds a Bag of Holding item.
body:
This is just a small mod that I wanted to make, and my first mod that I'm publishing to the public. 

This mod adds a Bag of Holding item that, when right-clicking while holding it, opens a nine-slot inventory that can be used to store tools, blocks, or items. 

![example of Bag of Holding inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76323250095ffe9be1c436fec9be15553cf28bc8.png)

The crafting recipie for the Bag of Holding takes 5 leather, 2 string, 1 amethyst shard, and 1 eye of ender, as shown in the image bellow. 

![string in top left and right, amethyst in top middle, eye of ender in centre, and leather everywhere else](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4937c8697d3b625ec364871bb9e6d48b786335d1.png)

Alternatively, they can be made a different colour by replacing the bottom middle with any colour dye. 

![string in top left and right, amethyst in top middle, eye of ender in centre, red dye in bottom middle, and leather everywhere else](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db770ec8f696f05bbfd3b417b1406974b9f5d1c1.png)

The Bag of Holding has a different inventory for each different instance of the item, meaning you can have multiple that have different things in them.
